title: Bia's First Wave
description: Past Simple for events that happened. Bia tells the class about the wave that changed her life — irregular verbs and all.
summary_pt_br: Past Simple contando a história da Bia pegando a primeira onda. Verbos regulares (-ed) e os irregulares essenciais: go/went, come/came, have/had, see/saw, take/took.

scenes.subtitle_en: A story told in the Past Simple

scenes.text_en:
I WAS eight. The sun WAS hot. I WENT to the beach with my dad.
I SAW a wave — big and blue. I TOOK a board he HAD.
I PADDLED out. I FELL once. I CRIED, just a bit.
Then I STOOD on the board, and I RODE. And I LOVED every bit.
scenes.text_pt:
Eu tinha oito. O sol FOI forte. FUI pra praia com o pai (went).
VI uma onda — grande e azul (saw). PEGUEI a prancha dele (took).
REMEI (paddled). CAÍ uma vez (fell). CHOREI um pouquinho (cried).
Aí EM PÉ fiquei, e SURFEI (rode). E ADOREI cada momentinho.

scenes.title: Past Simple — two halves
scenes.body_en: Regular verbs: add -ed. PLAY → PLAYED, WALK → WALKED, LIVE → LIVED. Irregular verbs: memorize them. GO → WENT, HAVE → HAD, SEE → SAW, TAKE → TOOK, COME → CAME. No -s, no -ed — the whole word changes.
scenes.body_pt: Past Simple tem dois lados. Verbos regulares: adiciona -ed (played, walked, lived). Verbos irregulares: decora — go→went, have→had, see→saw, take→took, come→came. Mudam inteiros.

exercise.question: Complete: 'She ___ her keys on the table.' (see)
Complete: 'We ___ a long walk last Sunday.' (take)
exercise.explanation: TAKE → TOOK. 'Take a walk' is a fixed expression.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Take → took. 'Take a walk' = dar uma caminhada (bloco fixo).

scenes.title: Past Simple questions and negatives use DID
scenes.body_en: For questions and negatives, use DID (or DIDN'T) + base verb. 'Did you go?' — NOT 'did you went'. 'I didn't see' — NOT 'I didn't saw'. DID carries the past tense; the main verb relaxes.
scenes.body_pt: Perguntas e negativas usam DID/DIDN'T + verbo BASE. 'Did you go?' não 'did you went'. 'I didn't see' não 'didn't saw'. O DID carrega o passado; o verbo principal relaxa.

examples.en: No, I didn't go to the beach.

exercise.question: Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: DID + base verb. 'Did you GO?' — never 'did you went'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Did + verbo base. 'Did you go?' — nunca 'did you went'.

turns.en: I was eight. My dad gave me the board.
turns.pt: Eu tinha oito. Meu pai me deu a prancha.

turns.en: I fell once — then I stood up. I didn't give up.
turns.pt: Caí uma vez — aí fiquei em pé. Não desisti.

exercise.explanation: Five irregular verbs — memorize them as pairs. They appear in nearly every past story.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cinco irregulares que aparecem em quase toda história no passado.
